title: metaswarm Diagnostic envelope (v0)
description: Envelope shape for every diagnostic emitted by a metaswarm pack-system validator, the loader, or the test harness. Locked by ADR-0002 §'Diagnostic envelope'. Updates require a superseding ADR per ADR-0011 §1. Mirror of `src/pack-system/diagnostics/types.ts`.

code.description: Stable diagnostic identifier of the form `<prefix>-<digits>`, where `<prefix>` is one of the v0 code prefixes registered in `src/pack-system/diagnostics/registry.ts` (MS-SCH, MS-CAP-PERM, MS-EXT, MS-DEP, MS-CFL, MS-NS, MS-GATE, MS-CAP-BIND, MS-HRN-CAT<N>).

validator.description: Validator or harness component that emitted this diagnostic, e.g. `JsonSchemaValidator`, `NamespaceCollisionValidator`, `Harness:cat12`.

path.description: JSON Pointer (RFC 6901) into the parsed manifest or other JSON-shaped artifact.

enforces.description: Invariant numbers from docs/principles.md that this diagnostic upholds. v0 invariant range is 1..28 (frame-frozen by ADR-0011 §1).

related.description: Cross-file context (e.g., the OTHER pack involved in a namespace collision). Each entry follows the same envelope.

docs_url.description: Deep link to the relevant ADR section or principles invariant. In-repo anchor convention: `<adr-or-principles>.md#invariant-NN` or `<adr-or-principles>.md#section-X`. Full URIs are also accepted. Validated as `uri-reference` (RFC 3986) so relative repo paths resolve. The CI lint script (`scripts/lint-docs-anchors.ts`) resolves the in-repo anchor forms.
